methodology: Annual rolling-origin validation over 2021-2025. Lower Brier score and log loss are better; active model promotion requires consistent improvement over Elo-only. Experimental context modifiers remain disabled by default unless explicitly evaluated and improved across every enabled window.

models.elo-baseline: Elo-only baseline with a smoothed historical draw rate.
models.elo-poisson: Elo ratings converted to independent Poisson score probabilities.
models.elo-poisson-dixon-coles: Elo-Poisson score probabilities with Dixon-Coles low-score adjustment.
models.elo-poisson-strength: Elo-Poisson probabilities with recent attack/defense multipliers.
models.uniform-baseline: Uniform baseline: fixed 1/3 probability for home win, draw, and away win.

selection.reason: elo-poisson-strength beat the Elo-only baseline on Brier score and log loss in every evaluated annual window.

experimentalModifiers.policy: Experimental match context modifiers are feature-flagged disabled by default and should not be promoted unless enabled backtests improve both Brier score and log loss in every evaluated window.

windows.methodology: Rolling-origin historical match backtest: train ratings before the window, score each test match before applying that result, and evaluate calibrated home/draw/away probabilities.
